falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would invalidate the HOLD signal and suggest a trend reversal contrary to the bottom pattern analysis.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 Volatility Index (VIX) drops below 15 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Extremely low volatility would contradict the blowoff score's implication of market stress, invalidating the current UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: A major central bank announces a 50-basis-point rate cut within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a policy shift would directly contradict the pattern's implied economic environment, falsifying the current HOLD signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
